evidence_summary: Establish the political transition and public stakes through a formal announcement. The scene must visually communicate the shift from Oz's deceptive authority to the Scarecrow's temporary governance as Oz departs for the clouds.

Oz makes a formal announcement to the citizens of the Emerald City. He claims he is traveling to visit a "brother Wizard" in the clouds. To maintain order, he appoints the Scarecrow as the temporary ruler of the city.
From public spectacle to a sense of formal transition.
Oz stands before a large crowd, preparing for a formal address.
the_scarecrow stands in an official capacity as the city transitions to his rule.
Oz announces his departure and appoints the Scarecrow as ruler.
